name: Sunfish
description: A river fish available during daytime in spring and summer under sunny or windy weather.
beginnerNote: A river fish available during daytime in spring and summer under sunny or windy weather.

name: Catfish
description: A difficult rainy-weather fish found in rivers and several special freshwater locations.
beginnerNote: A difficult rainy-weather fish found in rivers and several special freshwater locations.

name: Shad
description: A rainy-weather river fish available in spring, summer, and fall.
beginnerNote: A rainy-weather river fish available in spring, summer, and fall.

name: Tiger Trout
description: A river fish available during daytime in fall and winter.
beginnerNote: A river fish available during daytime in fall and winter.

name: Largemouth Bass
description: A mountain lake fish available during daytime in all seasons.
beginnerNote: A mountain lake fish available during daytime in all seasons.

name: Carp
description: A common freshwater fish found in the mountain lake and several special locations.

beginnerNote: A daytime ocean fish available in summer and fall.

name: Walleye
description: A rainy fall fish found in rivers, lakes, and forest ponds during the afternoon and night.

name: Perch

name: Rainbow Trout

name: Octopus

name: Albacore
description: The Albacore is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm during Fall and Winter in the early morning and at night. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g.
beginnerNote: The Albacore is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm during Fall and Winter in the early morning and at night. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g.

name: Angler
description: The Angler is a fish that can be caught in Pelican Town during Fall. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.
beginnerNote: The Angler is a fish that can be caught in Pelican Town during Fall. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.

name: Blobfish
description: The Blobfish is a fish that can be caught in the submarine ride at the Night Market, which takes place at The Beach during Winter 15-17.
beginnerNote: The Blobfish is a fish that can be caught in the submarine ride at the Night Market, which takes place at The Beach during Winter 15-17.

name: Blue Discus
description: The Blue Discus is a fish that can be caught on Ginger Island during any season on Island North and West (freshwater).
beginnerNote: The Blue Discus is a fish that can be caught on Ginger Island during any season on Island North and West (freshwater).

name: Chub
description: The Chub is a fish that can be caught in the mountain lake and the Cindersap Forest River during all seasons. Unlike most fish found in the Forest River, it cannot be caught in Pelican Town. It can also be gifted by a pet cat with max friendship. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 150-1,000g.
beginnerNote: The Chub is a fish that can be caught in the mountain lake and the Cindersap Forest River during all seasons. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 150-1,000g.

name: Crimsonfish
description: The Crimsonfish is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach during Summer. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.
beginnerNote: The Crimsonfish is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach during Summer. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.

name: Dorado
description: The Dorado is a fish that can be caught in the forest river during Summer. It can also be gifted by a pet cat with max friendship. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 300-1,000g.
beginnerNote: The Dorado is a fish that can be caught in the forest river during Summer. It can also be gifted by a pet cat with max friendship. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 300-1,000g.

name: Ghostfish
description: The Ghostfish is a fish that can be caught in The Mines on the 20th and 60th floor during all seasons. A Ghost may also drop a Ghostfish (8% chance) when slain. It can also randomly be found at the Traveling Cart for 135-1,000g.
beginnerNote: The Ghostfish is a fish that can be caught in The Mines on the 20th and 60th floor during all seasons. A Ghost may also drop a Ghostfish (8% chance) when slain. It can also randomly be found at the Traveling Cart for 135-1,000g.

name: Glacierfish
description: The Glacierfish is a fish that can be caught in Cindersap Forest during Winter. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.
beginnerNote: The Glacierfish is a fish that can be caught in Cindersap Forest during Winter. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.

name: Glacierfish Jr.
description: The Glacierfish Jr. is one of the five Legendary Fish that must be caught for Mr. Qi's Extended Family Quest. It has the same sell price, healing effect, location, and chance of hooking as the Glacierfish. It can only be caught when the quest is active, but more than one can be caught per quest.

name: Goby
description: The Goby is a fish that can be caught at the bottom of the waterfalls in southern Cindersap Forest during any season. The waterfalls are located just east of the Abandoned House.
beginnerNote: The Goby is a fish that can be caught at the bottom of the waterfalls in southern Cindersap Forest during any season. The waterfalls are located just east of the Abandoned House.

name: Ice Pip
description: The Ice Pip is a fish that can be caught in the Mines on the 60th floor during all seasons. The only other fish that can be caught there is the Ghostfish.
beginnerNote: The Ice Pip is a fish that can be caught in the Mines on the 60th floor during all seasons. The only other fish that can be caught there is the Ghostfish.

name: Lava Eel
description: The Lava Eel is a fish that can be caught during all times and seasons in the Mines on the 100th floor and at the Volcano Caldera. It is the only fish that can spawn in lava.
beginnerNote: The Lava Eel is a fish that can be caught during all times and seasons in the Mines on the 100th floor and at the Volcano Caldera. It is the only fish that can spawn in lava.

name: Legend
description: The Legend is a fish that can be caught during Spring in the Mountain lake during rainy weather. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.
beginnerNote: The Legend is a fish that can be caught during Spring in the Mountain lake during rainy weather. It is one of the five Legendary Fish, so it can only be caught once per save file, or once per player in Multiplayer.

name: Lingcod
description: The Lingcod is a fish that can be caught in the river (in Pelican Town or Cindersap Forest) or the Mountain Lake during Winter. It can also be gifted by a pet cat with max friendship. It may also randomly appear in Krobus' shop on Wednesdays for >200g, or at the Traveling Cart for 360-1,000g.

name: Lionfish
description: The Lionfish is a fish that can be caught on Ginger Island during any season on Island West (ocean), South, and Southeast.
beginnerNote: The Lionfish is a fish that can be caught on Ginger Island during any season on Island West (ocean), South, and Southeast.

name: Midnight Carp
description: The Midnight Carp is a fish that can be caught in the mountain lake and the Cindersap Forest pond during Fall and Winter late at night. It can also be caught on many of the non-standard Farm Maps: Forest, Riverland, Wilderness, and the large pond on the Four Corners Map. It can also be caught during any season in Ginger Island North and West (freshwater). It can also be gifted by a pet cat with max friendship. It can also randomly be found at the Traveling Cart for 450-1,000g or in Garbage Cans during Fall or Winter.

name: Midnight Squid

name: Pufferfish
description: The Pufferfish is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm on sunny summer days between 12pm and 4pm, or on Ginger Island during any season on Island West (ocean), South, Southeast, and in the Pirate Cove. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans during Summer, or at the Traveling Cart for 600-1,000g.

name: Red Mullet
description: The Red Mullet is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm during Summer and Winter. It may also randomly appear at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g or in Garbage Cans during Summer or Winter.

name: Sandfish
description: The Sandfish is a fish that can be caught in the pond at The Desert during all seasons. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans after unlocking The Desert, or at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g.
beginnerNote: The Sandfish is a fish that can be caught in the pond at The Desert during all seasons. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans after unlocking The Desert, or at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g.

name: Scorpion Carp
description: The Scorpion Carp is a fish that can be caught in the pond at The Desert during all seasons. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans after unlocking The Desert, or at the Traveling Cart for 450-1,000g. The only other fish that can be caught in the Desert is the Sandfish.

name: Sea Cucumber
description: The Sea Cucumber is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm during Fall and Winter. It can also be randomly found in Garbage Cans during Fall and Winter, or at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g. There is a 5% chance to catch a Sea Cucumber during the deep-sea submarine ride at the Night Market during Winter 15-17 (4% if using a Curiosity Lure).

name: Spook Fish
description: The Spook Fish is a fish that can be caught in the submarine ride at the Night Market, which takes place at The Beach during Winter 15-17.
beginnerNote: The Spook Fish is a fish that can be caught in the submarine ride at the Night Market, which takes place at The Beach during Winter 15-17.

name: Squid
description: The Squid is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm in the evening during Winter. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans during Winter, or at the Traveling Cart for 240-1,000g. Squid can be caught during the entire day on Winter 12th and 13th during the SquidFest festival. Pierre sells five Squid for > 10 Calico Eggs each during the Desert Festival.
beginnerNote: The Squid is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm in the evening during Winter. name: Stingray
description: The Stingray is a fish that can be caught at the Pirate Cove on Ginger Island Southeast.
beginnerNote: The Stingray is a fish that can be caught at the Pirate Cove on Ginger Island Southeast.

name: Stonefish
description: The Stonefish is a fish that can be caught in The Mines on the 20th floor during all seasons. The only other fish that can be caught on the 20th floor of the mines is the Ghostfish.
beginnerNote: The Stonefish is a fish that can be caught in The Mines on the 20th floor during all seasons. The only other fish that can be caught on the 20th floor of the mines is the Ghostfish.

name: Super Cucumber
description: The Super Cucumber is a fish that can be caught in the ocean at The Beach or on the Beach Farm during Summer and Fall evenings, and on Ginger Island South, Southeast, West (ocean), and the Pirate Cove during any season. It can also randomly be found in Garbage Cans during Summer and Fall, or at the Traveling Cart for 750-1,250g. There is a 4% chance to catch a Super Cucumber during the deep-sea submarine ride at the Night Market during Winter 15-17 (7% if using a Curiosity Lure). The Statue Of Endless Fortune produces one Super Cucumber per year on the Wizard's birthday, Winter 17.

The Statue Of Endless Fortune produces one Super Cucumber per year on the Wizard's birthday, Winter 17.

name: Void Salmon
description: The Void Salmon is a fish that can be caught in the Witch's Swamp during all seasons.
beginnerNote: The Void Salmon is a fish that can be caught in the Witch's Swamp during all seasons.

name: Woodskip
description: The Woodskip is a fish that can be caught in the pond in the Secret Woods during any season. It is most prevalent there on non-rainy days, with each cast having a 15% to 27% chance to hook a Woodskip depending on fishing skill. The Woodskip is more likely to be caught when casting at least 3 tiles from shore. It can also be caught on the Forest Farm, with each cast having a 0% to 17.5% chance to hook a Woodskip depending on daily luck. It can also randomly be found at the Traveling Cart for 225-1,000g.
